title: Heritage Month 2026
content:
Heritage Month 2026 - St. Camillus

Saturday, October 24, 2026 - Parish Hall

Schedule (authoritative)

  • 1:00 PM - Volunteer setup begins
  • 4:30 PM - Community band and cultural performances
  • 5:15 PM - Buffet dinner served
  • 6:00 PM - Pastor's program and community reflection

Our target is 220 attendees. Please RSVP via Eventbrite: Heritage Month RSVP.

Volunteer lanes: Setup, Food, Registration, Kids, Cultural Booths, AV, Cleanup, Photography.

title: Give to the Parish
content:
Support St. Camillus

Online giving supports Sunday offertory, Building fund, Youth ministry, and Heritage Month. Every gift matters.
